commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import joblib

class DemoClassifier:
    def __init__(self):
        # Laad het getrainde model
        self.model = joblib.load("model.pkl")

        # Eventuele mappings voor categorische kolommen
        self.sex_map = {"M": 0, "V": 1}
        self.bin_map = {"+": 1, "-": 0}

    def preprocess(self, df):
        df = df.copy()

        # Converteer categorische kolommen
        df["geslacht"] = df["geslacht"].map(self.sex_map)
        df["hypertensie"] = df["hypertensie"].map(self.bin_map)
        df["hartinfarct"] = df["hartinfarct"].map(self.bin_map)
        df["diabetes"] = df["diabetes"].map(self.bin_map)
        df["nierziekte"] = df["nierziekte"].map(self.bin_map)

        # Drop ID kolommen
        df = df.drop(columns=["Individu-ID"], errors="ignore")

        return df

    def predict(self, filename="competition_test.csv"):
        df = pd.read_csv(filename)
        X = self.preprocess(df)

        preds = self.model.predict(X)

        # True = CHD+, False = CHD-
        return preds.astype(bool)
